description: Configure Tor Browser to always prioritize .onion sites when known. Navigate to a clearnet website that advertises an Onion-Location (such as https://duckduckgo.com/ or https://check.torproject.org/) and allow the browser to route to the .onion version. Bookmark the resulting .onion page in a new bookmark folder named 'Auto-Routed Onions'. Document the original clearnet URL and the final .onion URL in a report at /home/ga/Documents/onion_routing_report.txt.
